assessment.name: Green Goods Assessment v2
assessment.description: Assessment v2 schema for Green Goods gardens. Stores title, description, and location on-chain. The full strategy kernel (diagnosis, SMART outcomes, Cynefin phase, domain, SDG targets, attachments) is stored in IPFS and referenced by assessmentConfigCID.

work.name: Green Goods Work Submission
work.description: Work submission schema for Green Goods protocol. Enables gardeners to submit completed regenerative agriculture tasks with media evidence and metadata for verification and payment.

workApproval.name: Green Goods Work Approval
workApproval.description: Work approval schema for Green Goods protocol. Allows validators to approve or reject submitted work with feedback and verification confidence scoring, enabling trustless verification of regenerative activities.
